coverage_note: The bundled PIK3CA population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from PIK3CA PI3K lipid kinase signaling, PIP3 production, AKT-mTOR activation, cell growth, metabolism, and survival and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000121879: PIK3CA coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: PIK3CA findings should be read against PI3K lipid kinase signaling, PIP3 production, AKT-mTOR activation, cell growth, metabolism, and survival; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

PIK3CA E542K/E545K/H1047R model is curated as a PIK3CA marker for PI3K-AKT-mTOR signaling and cancer context, Overgrowth and mosaic activation review; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

PIK3CA mosaic overgrowth model is curated as a PIK3CA marker for PI3K-AKT-mTOR signaling and cancer context, Overgrowth and mosaic activation review; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
